ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Loyalty program ID */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Registration date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "item_id" TEXT /* Item ID of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Brand ID */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being purchased */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status */,
  "transaction_fee" TEXT /* Transaction fee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Shipping address ID */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Order status */,
  "shipping_carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES shipping_addresses ("shipping_address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "item_price" TEXT /* Price of the item */,
  "item_discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_addresses" (
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the address belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Address type */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer accessing the system */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the customer has */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
